description_long: This is a modern passenger train carriage with a streamlined, aerodynamic front and a long, rectangular body. The exterior is primarily white with a gray roof and a thin red stripe running horizontally along the sides, reminiscent of European high-speed trains like the ICE. Large, rectangular windows are evenly spaced along both sides, allowing ample light into the passenger compartment. The front features a sloped windshield and headlight arrangement, while the rear is flat and windowless. The undercarriage includes visible wheels and suspension components, and the overall design suggests a focus on speed and passenger comfort.
description: A sleek, white modern passenger train carriage with a gray roof, red accent stripe, and large rectangular windows along the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the train, with evenly spaced windows and a red stripe along the white body.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, windowless end of the train and the gray roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the windows, doors, and red stripe.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the aerodynamic nose, windshield, and headlight arrangement.
